WHY NOVE

Focus on your business —
not the app.

An intuitive Point of Sale application designed to simplify sales, reduce clicks, and let you get back to what matters.

Grow smarter!

Nove simplifies business management with an intuitive design and powerful tools that adapt to your needs, helping you focus on growth and customer satisfaction.

Stay ahead!

Streamline your daily operations, reduce complexity, and ensure your business stays ahead with Nove's reliable and feature-rich platform.

Built for you!

Tailored to your unique business needs, Nove combines simplicity and innovation to give you a POS system that grows with you.

🏢

Multicompany

Handle more than one company or multiple locations effortlessly within a single NOVE instance.

📦

Inventory

Keep track of complete movement of all products from purchase, sale, return and other crucial info.

👥

Customers

Add customers instantly during checkout and easily manage their debit/credit ledger and history.

🧠

NOVE AI Insights

Intelligent auditing and sales forecasting that predicts trends and optimizes your business growth.

WHAT CLIENTS SAY

Trusted by businesses across Pakistan

Real feedback from real business owners using NOVE POS every day.

★★★★★

"NOVE POS completely transformed how we manage our electronics shop. The inventory alerts alone have saved us from running out of stock three times this month. The AI insights are genuinely impressive."

AR
Ahmad Raza
Owner — TechZone Electronics, Lahore
★★★★★

"We run three clothing stores across Karachi. Before NOVE, syncing between locations was a nightmare. Now everything is real-time. The multicompany feature is worth the price alone."

SK
Sara Khan
Director — Elegance Boutique, Karachi
★★★★★

"The offline mode is a lifesaver in areas with unstable internet. My team processes hundreds of transactions daily without a single sync error. Customer support responds in minutes. Incredible product."

MH
Muhammad Hassan
CEO — Hassan General Store, Faisalabad
WHY SWITCH

NOVE vs the competition

See why thousands of businesses choose NOVE over generic alternatives.

Feature NOVE POS ⭐ Square POS QuickBooks POS Generic POS
Works 100% Offline ✓ Full Offline Partial ✗ Partial
AI Sales Insights ✓ Built-in Add-on ✗ ✗
Multicompany / Multi-Branch ✓ Native Limited ✓ ✗
PKR / Local Currency Support ✓ Full Support ✗ ✗ Varies
Google Drive Backup ✓ Auto Hourly ✗ ✗ ✗
Debtors Ledger ✓ Advanced ✗ Basic ✗
One-Time License Option ✓ Available ✗ Monthly Only ✗ Monthly Only Varies
